description: Governed live founder-feedback cases that prove AnythingLLM or gateway feedback can become baseline candidates, holdout candidates, repair follow-ups, or rejected findings without mutating source repositories.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: missing: this should become a baseline prompt because future answers must include the source mutation boundary and direct source refs. useful: the function target was correct.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for duplicated placed_order_id lookup risks. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: missing: add this as a holdout prompt so future repairs do not overfit the main placed_order_id review cases. useful: the answer stayed read only.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp, diagnose this issue: a tester says the stealth lookup answer missed the likely root cause. Read only.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: wrong: the answer missed the likely root cause and needs a repair follow-up before this prompt family can be trusted.

cases.seed_prompt: In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests.
cases.feedback_template: Record feedback for run {run_id}: useful: the answer was clear, chat-visible, and does not need a new baseline or repair.
